title: AI agents explained: Build your first agent in 8 minutes
summary: Google Cloud Tech released a tutorial on building autonomous AI agents using the Google Agent Development Kit (ADK). The video covers ReAct Framework theory, three agent patterns, and demonstrates a self-correcting multi-agent Blog Writing system with validation and retry logic.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through building autonomous AI agents with the Google Agent Development Kit (ADK), covering the ReAct framework and three agent patterns. The tutorial demonstrates a self-correcting multi-agent blog writing system that uses validation checkers and retry logic to revise its output. Concrete takeaways include agent orchestration across multiple cooperating agents and the use of loop agents to drive the validation and retry cycle.
